title: Samdhin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Samdhin with a Z-Score of +3.71. This critical event has a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Samdhin is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 32%, and the wind speed is 7.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact immediately.
